title: pig3WOW
description: WOW This is really pig3??? Can you kill him???
body:
Is it really a pig3??? I don't believe it came out!!! The strongest pig in minecraft ever?
If you can, post it on YouTube or bilibili! This is a new hype, 67, diddy blud, skibidy toilet, italian brainrot! I radiate hype!
The strongest pig that can win any mob battle in Minecraft 1.20.1



This Forge MOD adds a special pig "Pig3" to Minecraft.
If you summon Pig3 near a living entity, Pig3 will kill it, no matter how strongly modded it is.
Enjoy your mob battles with Pig3 and any other MOD mobs.

I checked Pig3 can kill other MOD mobs like Warden, Bedrock Golem, Wither, Ender dragon, and even Ignis


If you find any MOD that can kill Pig3, please tell me its link. I will improve Pig3.

Thank you for featuring Pig3 in so many videos! https://search.bilibili.com/all?keyword=Pig3

Thank you.

このForge用MODは特別なブタ「Pig3」をマイクラに追加します。
敵エンティティの近くにPig2を出せば、どんな強いMODの敵でも殺します。
Mobバトルを楽しんでください。

Pig2が殺せる他MODのMobとして、Warden, Bedrock Golem, Wither, Ender dragon, and even Ignis などは確認済みです。


もしPig3を殺せるMODを見つけたら、そのリンクを教えてください。Pig3を改良します。

Pig3を多くの動画で扱ってくれてありがとうございます! https://search.bilibili.com/all?keyword=Pig3

よろしくお願いします。

This mod does not have a composition table, and the weapons inside are very excessive and not suitable for generation and use 这个Mod没有合成表，里面的武器很超标，不适合生存使用 This Mod is an artifact mod 这个Mod是一个神器mod The weapon inside is very high damage, can kill almost any creature 里面的武器伤害非常高，可以击杀几乎所有生物 This weapon also has a disarming weapon, which, as the name suggests, once in your hands you can't throw away 这把武器还有防缴械，顾名思义一旦拿到手上就扔不掉 Weapons, cool fonts, right buttons, NOT cool colored lightning 武器还有炫酷的字体，非也。右键帅气的彩色闪电
